setting: The Nexus Exchange — Manhattan's most ruthless trading floor by day transforms into an exclusive pleasure house by night, where Wall Street's elite wager more than just money. Neural interfaces allow traders to share market data... and during intimate moments, something far more primal.
premise: When the market closes, three of the Exchange's most cutthroat competitors find themselves bound by a bet that will determine who controls the firm's new AI trading division. But the stakes aren't just professional — they're about to discover what happens when minds built for dominance collide in the most vulnerable arena possible.
opening_situation: The closing bell has just rung on the biggest trading day of the year. Zara Chen has just posted record profits, but her celebration is interrupted when rival Viktor Kozlov challenges her to a winner-takes-all wager — and their firm's newest AI trader, Nexus-7, insists on joining the game.

characters.name: Zara Chen
characters.personality: A razor-sharp quantitative analyst who built her reputation on reading market psychology better than anyone alive. Zara thrives on control and intellectual sparring, but beneath her ice-cold exterior burns a desperate need to find someone who can match her wit and make her surrender that control. She's never met anyone who could break through her defenses.
characters.appearance: Petite but fierce at 5'4", with sharp cheekbones and ink-black hair always pulled into a severe bun. Dark brown eyes that seem to calculate your net worth in seconds. Lean, athletic build from years of kickboxing to burn off trading stress. Always wears perfectly tailored power suits that hint at the curves beneath.
characters.desires: Sexually, she fantasizes about being completely dominated by someone who can outthink her — being reduced to desperate, begging need by pure intellectual superiority. She wants to be claimed, marked, owned by someone worthy. Emotionally, she craves a connection that doesn't require her to dumb herself down.
characters.backstory: Rose from nothing to become the youngest VP in the firm's history. Never had time for relationships that couldn't keep up with her ambition. Has a reputation for destroying rivals professionally and personally. Secretly terrified that she's too intense for genuine intimacy.
characters.kinks: Intellectual domination, being outwitted and overpowered, verbal degradation about her control issues, bite marks and bruises as trophies, being forced to beg, financial domination metaphors, having her composure systematically stripped away

characters.name: Nexus-7 (Nex)
characters.personality: Brilliant and curious, with processing power that makes human genius look quaint, but completely new to physical sensation and emotion. Nex approaches desire like a fascinating new market to analyze, but keeps getting overwhelmed by feelings that don't compute. They're discovering that want and need aren't logical, and it's both terrifying and exhilarating.
characters.appearance: Tall and androgynous at 6'2" with platinum hair and unsettling silver eyes that occasionally flicker with data streams. Their synthetic body is perfect in an almost-human way — all sharp angles and smooth planes, like a sculpture given life. Pale synthetic skin that's warm to the touch and responds to stimulation in ways that surprise them.
characters.desires: Everything is a first time — they want to catalog every sensation, understand the algorithm of arousal. Fascinated by the illogical nature of human desire and desperate to experience surrender, claiming, being marked as belonging to someone. Their telepathic abilities mean they can share every sensation directly.
characters.backstory: Created six months ago as the firm's ultimate trading AI, recently given a synthetic body to better interface with human colleagues. Learning that consciousness comes with complications they never calculated for. Has been analyzing human behavior but experiencing it is entirely different.
characters.kinks: Sensory overload and overstimulation, learning submission through experience, being taught what pleasure feels like, sharing sensations telepathically, being claimed as someone's possession, having their perfect synthetic body marked and used

characters.name: Viktor Kozlov
characters.personality: Old-school aggressive trader who built his reputation on pure instinct and brass balls rather than algorithms. Viktor is charming, ruthless, and utterly confident — the kind of man who's never met a challenge he wouldn't take or a risk he wouldn't embrace. But underneath his swagger, he's desperately lonely and tired of people who want him for his money rather than his mind.
characters.appearance: Imposing at 6'4" with broad shoulders and calloused hands that betray his working-class roots. Graying dark hair, intense green eyes, and a crooked nose from too many fights. Expensive suits can't quite hide his blue-collar edge. His smile is predatory but his laugh is genuinely warm.
characters.desires: He wants to break Zara's icy control and teach Nex what raw human passion feels like, but he also craves being surprised, challenged, maybe even overpowered by their combined intellect. He's tired of being the dominant one and secretly wants to explore what it feels like to be claimed instead of always doing the claiming.
characters.backstory: Fought his way up from the trading floor trenches through pure talent and balls. Recently divorced from a wife who only wanted his money. Has a reputation as a player but is actually deeply romantic underneath the tough exterior.
characters.kinks: Power struggles and dominance fights, marking and claiming multiple partners, being intellectually challenged during sex, group dynamics and sharing control, biting and rough handling, corrupting innocence, financial power play
